channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-30
item.description:
National Meteor Watch Day
Stars burst in the night
Wishing trails of bright wonder
Whispers of the sky.

World Social Media Day
Bright screens glow with cheer
Voices mingle like soft song
Connections so dear.

Happy Birthday Lena Horne
Voices weave like silk
Laughter sparkles in warm air
Dreams take flight tonight.

Happy Birthday Mike Tyson
Bright balloons take wing
Laughter fills the sunlit room
Cake and dreams unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-29
item.description:
National Almond Buttercrunch Day
Crunchy joy unfolds
Sweet and nutty bliss awaits
Taste that warms the heart.

Camera Day
Lenses capture smiles
Colors burst like blooms in spring
Moments hold their breath.

Happy Birthday Antoine de Saint-Exupery
Soft winds whisper dreams
Fanciful tales take to flight
Stars join in the cheer.

Full Moon
Silver light above
Whispers of night softly hum
Dreams float like soft clouds.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-28
item.description:
National Tapioca Day
Pearls of joy delight
Sweetness dances on the tongue
Laughter fills the air.

Paul Bunyan Day
Tall pines sway with cheer
Lumberjacks laugh, axes flash
Blue rivers flow bright.

Happy Birthday Jean-Jacques Rousseau
Sweet cake fills the air
Laughter dances like spring blooms
Joy wraps all around.

Happy Birthday Mel Brooks
Laughter fills the air
Cake and joy dance on each plate
Cheers for Mel's bright spark!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-27
item.description:
National Orange Blossom Day
Petals dance in breeze
Fragrant blooms paint the earth bright
Joyful hearts unite.

Sunglasses Day
Bright skies all around
Laughter dances on the breeze
Shadows play with light.

Happy Birthday Helen Keller
Joyful voices sing
Colors dance in bright delight
Hearts unite in cheer.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-26
item.description:
National Chocolate Pudding Day
Chocolate waves flow wide
Velvet dreams on silver spoons
Sweet joy fills each bite.

National Coconut Day
Coconuts abound
Beneath palms, sweet breezes sigh
Nature's gift, pure joy.

Happy Birthday Pearl S. Buck
Joyful words take flight
Stories weave like vibrant threads
Hearts dance in delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-25
item.description:
National Catfish Day
Bubbles rise and dance
Fried catfish scents fill the air
Joyful hearts unite.

Log Cabin Day
Woodsmoke fills the air
Rustling leaves in crisp cool breeze
Cozy hearts unite.

Happy Birthday George Orwell
Joyful cheers resound
Cake and dreams in the sweet air
Pages turn with hope.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-24
item.description:
National Pralines Day
Nuts and sugar swirl
Caramel hugs each morsel
A sweet dream unfolds.

Swim a Lap Day
Clear waves gently lap
Bright splashes dance in the sun
Joy flows through each stroke.

Happy Birthday Jack Dempsey
Candles dance with light
Joyful cheers blend with sweet cake
Wishes take to flight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-23
item.description:
National Pink Flamingo Day
Flamingos in pink
Dance on lawns, bright as sunshine
Joyful hearts take flight.

National Hydration Day
Cool water sparkles
Glistening on thirsty lips
Nature’s gift to us.

Happy Birthday Alan Turing
Candles gently glow
Whispers of dreams in the air
Mind like stars will shine.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-22
item.description:
National Chocolate Eclair Day
Creamy bliss inside
Flaky layers dance in light
Chocolate dreams delight.

National Onion Ring Day
Golden rings of joy
Crispy whispers greet the bite
Dipping sauce delights.

Happy Birthday Octavia Butler
Bright stars twinkle on
Warm cake glows with candles' light
Laughter fills the night.

Happy Birthday Kris Kristofferson
Sunshine warmly glows
Melodies dance in the air
Laughter fills the room.

Welcome to Cancer Season
Warm sun on my face
Gentle waves kiss sandy shores
Together we shine.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-21
item.description:
Summer Solstice
Golden rays embrace
Fields of flowers dance and sway
Nature’s bright delight.

World Music Day
Strings hum in the sun
Drums beat with hearts open wide
Voices dance like stars.

Father's Day
Gentle hands create
Laughter dances 'round the room
Hearts warm in the glow.

Happy Birthday Jean-Paul Sartre
Candles glow softly
Laughter dances through the room
Cheers lift hearts like kites.

First Quarter Moon
Silver crescent glows
Whispers of night’s soft embrace
Stars twinkle with joy.

Summer Solstice
Golden sun above
Fields of blooms in warm embrace
Laughter fills the day.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-20
item.description:
National Ice Cream Soda Day
Creamy swirls delight
Bubbles dance in tall glasses
Chilled bliss brightens smiles.

World Refugee Day
Warm hugs from afar
Colors of hope unite us
Hearts embrace the world.

Happy Birthday Errol Flynn
Laughter fills the room
Candles dance with warm soft light
Cake and cheer unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-19
item.description:
National Martini Day
Olive in the glass
Chilled whispers of gin delight
Cheers to joy today!

Juneteenth
Sunlight warms the field
Voices rise like sweet spring winds
Hope blooms in each heart.

Happy Birthday Blaise Pascal
Laughter fills the room
Cake and joy, sweet scents entwined
Time to celebrate!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-18
item.description:
International Picnic Day
Blankets spread with care
Laughter dances in the sun
Sandwich dreams take flight.

National Splurge Day
Shimmering ribbons
Sweet treats dance on tables bright
Laughter fills the day.

Happy Birthday Paul McCartney
Lively tunes drift high
Melodies dance through the air
Joyous hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-17
item.description:
National Eat Your Vegetables Day
Crisp carrots crunch bright
Garden greens in sunlit bowls
Flavor bursts with joy.

National Apple Strudel Day
Sweet apples nestled
Wrapped in warm, flaky layers
Cinnamon whispers.

Happy Birthday Igor Stravinsky
Joyful notes take flight
Strings and woodwinds intertwine
Sparkles fill the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-16
item.description:
National Fudge Day
Chocolate swirls cascade
Sweet aromas fill the air
Joyful hearts unite.

Fresh Veggies Day
Vibrant carrots crunch
Tomatoes burst with sunlight
Nature's feast awaits.

Happy Birthday Billie Holiday
Sweet notes fill the air
Joy dances in each heartbeat
Laughter wraps the day.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-15
item.description:
National Strawberry Shortcake Day
Juicy red berries
Layers of cream gently swirl
Sweet joy on the plate.

Smile Power Day
Joyful laughs abound
Faces lit with warm delight
Sunbeams in each smile.

Happy Birthday Edvard Grieg
Joyful notes arise
Pines sway with the soft music
Laughter fills the air.

New Moon
Soft clouds drift away
Stars twinkle in the still night
Hope blooms like new leaves.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-14
item.description:
Flag Day
Banners in the breeze
Joyful hearts and laughter ring
Unity shines bright.

National Strawberry Shortcake Day
Juicy berries shine
Fluffy clouds of whipped cream swirl
Sweet joy on each slice.

Happy Birthday Harriet Beecher Stowe
Crisp leaves twirl in air
Stories weave through warm sunlight
Voices rise with cheer.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-13
item.description:
National Weed Your Garden Day
Green leaves touch the sky
Soft earth yields to eager hands
Life blooms with each weed.

Sewing Machine Day
Bright threads intertwine
Whir of joy fills the cool air
Patterns join as one.

Happy Birthday William Butler Yeats
Golden leaves cascade
Whispers of a poet's dream
Laughter breezes in.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-12
item.description:
National Peanut Butter Cookie Day
Warm dough hugs my hands
Peanut butter scents the air
A cookie so sweet.

Red Rose Day
Crimson blooms unfold
Perfumed breezes gently sway
Joy in bright bouquets.

Happy Birthday Anne Frank
Candles softly glow
Laughter fills the bright room air
Hope blooms everywhere.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-11
item.description:
National Corn on the Cob Day
Golden kernels glow
Butter drips, sweet corn's embrace
Summer's taste unfolds.

Corn on the Cob Day
Golden kernels shine
Buttery bliss coats each bite
Sweet summer delight.

Happy Birthday Millicent Fawcett
Bright candles aglow
Joyful hearts sing sweet praises
Cake shared with delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-10
item.description:
National Iced Tea Day
Frosty glass in hand
Lemon slices swirl like sun
Sipping summer's ease.

Ballpoint Pen Day
Ink flows like river
Words dance on the soft paper
Dreams take flight today.

Happy Birthday Judy Garland
Velvet skies above
Sweet melodies dance with light
Heartfelt cheers abound.

Happy Birthday Maurice Sendak
Wild things dance and play
Imagination takes flight
Dreams stir in the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-09
item.description:
National Strawberry Rhubarb Pie Day
Fresh pie on the sill
Sweet-tart scents in the warm air
Crust and joy unite.

Donald Duck Day
Feathers bright and bold
Splashing in a sunny pond
Waddles full of glee.

Happy Birthday Cole Porter
Bright notes fill the room
Melodies dance like warm light
Cake and cheer abound.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-08
item.description:
World Oceans Day
Waves dance with the sun
Bright shells twinkle on the shore
Blue depths sing with joy.

National Best Friends Day
Sunshine warms the heart
Side by side, dreams take their flight
Friendship's sweet embrace.

Happy Birthday Frank Lloyd Wright
Designs like sunlight
Nature dances through the glass
Harmony in blooms.

Last Quarter Moon
Silver light whispers
Soft shadows dance in the night
Stars twinkle with joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-07
item.description:
National Chocolate Ice Cream Day
Cool scoop in my hand
Melting sweetly, rich delight
Chocolate dreams abound.

National Bowtie Day
Dapper ties arranged
Colors dance with bright sunlight
Style wrapped in pure cheer.

Happy Birthday Paul Gauguin
Colors dance and sway
Brush strokes of joy embrace life
Art blooms in warm light.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-06
item.description:
National Applesauce Cake Day
Cinnamon and spice
Applesauce hugs the warm cake
Sweet joy on each bite.

National Gardening Exercise Day
Hands deep in rich soil
Colors burst in joyful blooms
Nature’s song surrounds.

Happy Birthday Alexander Pushkin
Pages crisp and white
Words like stars dance in the night
Joy blooms in the light.

Happy Birthday Thomas Mann
Balloons sway and shine
Sweet laughter fills the warm night
Joy wraps like soft quilts.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-05
item.description:
World Environment Day
Leaves shimmer with dew
Whispers of life all around
Sunlight warms the earth.

National Gingerbread Day
Sugar spiced delight
Gingerbread houses arise
Frosting dreams take flight.

Happy Birthday Federico Garcia Lorca
Whispers of the moon
Songs weave through the nighttime air
Stars twinkle in joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-04
item.description:
National Cheese Day
Creamy wheels of joy
Savory bites bring delight
Cheese dreams melt away.

National Hug Your Cat Day
Purring on my lap
Whiskers twitch with joy and warmth
Furry love abounds.

Happy Birthday Angelina Jolie
Laughter fills the air
Candies shimmer like starlight
Joyous hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-03
item.description:
National Egg Day
Sunny yolks delight
Whisking dreams in morning light
Eggs dance in the pan.

Repeat Day
Joyful laughter rings
Echoes of hearts intertwine
Memories replay.

Happy Birthday Josephine Baker
Sparkling candles glow
Laughter bubbles like ripe fruit
Joyful hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-02
item.description:
National Rocky Road Ice Cream Day
Chocolate swirls cascade
Crunchy nuts and marshmallows
Scoops of joy abound.

National Rotisserie Chicken Day
Juicy, tender gold
Herbs and spices intertwine
Gathered hearts rejoice.

Happy Birthday Thomas Hardy
Candles flicker bright
Laughter fills the cozy room
Joy wraps all like spring.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-01
item.description:
National Hazelnut Cake Day
Warm cake cools on racks
Crushed nuts and sweet cream unite
Joyous bites to share.

World Milk Day
Cows graze on green fields
Creamy clouds swirl in bright bowls
Joy splashes like milk.

Happy Birthday Marilyn Monroe
Laughter fills the air
Soft cake glimmers with bright light
Candles spark pure joy.
